steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: The relative pronoun which refers to the singular noun the Nerf football. The verb and noun phrase in the blank must therefore be singular as well.

steps.title: Reject plural verb phrases
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C all use plural verb forms or plural complements, which do not agree with the singular subject the Nerf football. The sentence needs a singular present description of what the toy is. The answer is D.
